pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the site with quick access to products, services, support, training, and at-a-glance cart/quote status.
primary_functions: Provide quick navigation to products, services, support resources, and training events
Highlight featured laptops, accessories, servers, and key service offerings
Give direct access to the shopping cart and quote cart via global header controls

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on featured Laptops category or "Shop Laptops" CTA
Click on featured Accessories category
Click on featured Servers category
Click on featured Software Development / CRM Integration service
Click on featured Hardware Services / On-Site Support service
Click on featured Managed IT Support plans section
Click on Support/Knowledge Base teaser section
Click on Training & Events teaser section
Click on "Configure a Custom Server" CTA
Click on Cart icon in global header
Click on Quote Cart icon in global header

access_methods.description: Direct access via root URL or index.html

pages.name: Product Listing / Category
pages.description: Category and search page for browsing laptops, accessories, and servers with filters and sorting.
primary_functions: Browse products by category such as laptops, accessories, and servers using categoryId parameters
Filter products by usage type, RAM, storage, screen size, price, rating, and shipping options
Sort product results (e.g., by price low to high) to find the most suitable or cheapest items
Open individual product detail pages or access the custom server configurator from server listings

incoming_params.description: Top-level product category to display (e.g., 'laptops', 'accessories', 'servers').
Accessory subcategory such as keyboards, mice, or cables when categoryId=accessories.
Optional search term to pre-filter products within the selected category.
Optional sort key such as 'price_asc' or 'price_desc'.
Current results page for pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a non-configurable product card (e.g., laptop or accessory)
Click on "Custom Configure" for a configurable server product
Click on Cart icon in global header
Click on site logo or Home breadcrumb

access_methods.description: Via "All Products", "Laptops", "Accessories", or "Servers" header links (with appropriate categoryId).
Direct access using products.html?categoryId=<slug> and optional query/sort/page parameters.
Links from homepage featured categories and other promotional blocks.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single product such as a laptop or accessory.
primary_functions: Show detailed product information including specifications, price, rating, and shipping details
Allow users to set quantity and add the product to the shopping cart
Provide navigation back to the relevant product category or listing

incoming_params.description: Product ID to display details for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "View Cart" after adding item or Cart icon in header
Click on "Back to <Category>" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?id=<productId> from listings or shared links.
Linked from product listings, recommendations, and cart line items.

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Cart page for reviewing and updating items before checkout.
primary_functions: Display all products added to the cart with quantities, prices, and subtotals
Allow users to update quantities or remove items from the cart
Accept and apply promo codes such as SAVE10 and display adjusted totals
Let users select available shipping methods including free shipping options and proceed to checkout

incoming_params.description: Optional URL to return to after reviewing the cart.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Proceed to Checkout" button
Click on "Continue Shopping" link
Click on product name within cart line item

access_methods.description: Click on Cart icon or "Cart" header link.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout flow for completing purchases from the shopping cart.
primary_functions: Collect billing and shipping information for the order
Summarize order items, discounts, shipping, and total cost before payment
Allow users to confirm and place the order using their chosen payment method

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Return to Home" after a successful order submission
Click on "Back to Cart" link to modify items before placing order

access_methods.description: Accessed after user clicks "Proceed to Checkout" from the cart.
Direct access via checkout.html (will redirect or show error if cart is empty).

pages.name: Software Development Services
pages.description: Service page describing software development offerings including CRM integration, with an embedded quote request form.
primary_functions: Present software development capabilities with a dedicated CRM Integration section or card
Allow users to open and complete a quote request form for custom CRM integration projects
Capture project details such as name, email, project type, estimated budget, desired start date, and preferred contact method
Submit quote requests including a textual project description for follow-up by the company

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected project type for deep links (e.g., 'custom_crm_integration').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on general "Contact Us" link from this service page
Click on site logo or Home breadcrumb

access_methods.description: Links from homepage featured services or marketing campaigns.

pages.name: Hardware Services & On-Site Support
pages.description: Service page for hardware services and on-site support, including scheduling maintenance visits.
primary_functions: Describe available hardware services such as workstation maintenance and on-site support
Provide a clear call to action to schedule maintenance or book an on-site visit
Offer a scheduling form to set service type, number of devices, preferred date and time, and office address
Collect contact details (name and email) and submit maintenance visit requests

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected service type such as 'workstation_maintenance'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on site logo or Home breadcrumb
Click on general hardware support contact link

pages.name: Managed IT Support Plans
pages.description: Page listing IT support plans with features and pricing, and starting the sign-up process.
primary_functions: Display multiple IT support plans (e.g., Basic, Standard, Premium) with feature lists and monthly pricing
Help users identify which plans include 24/7 support and on-site visits and compare them
Allow users to select the most suitable plan and view its details within the page
Provide an embedded sign-up form to start onboarding, collecting company name, size, contact person, email, phone, and country, and proceed to the next step

incoming_params.description: Optional ID of a plan to preselect when arriving on this page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on site logo or Home breadcrumb
Click on general "Contact Sales" link from this page

pages.name: Knowledge Base
pages.description: Searchable knowledge base and help center for support articles.
primary_functions: Search knowledge base articles by keywords such as 'server overheating'
Filter articles by product or model, including specific servers like ProRack Server X200
Display a list of matching articles and allow navigation to individual article pages
Provide access to saved/bookmarked articles via a link to the Saved Articles page

incoming_params.description: Search term such as 'server overheating'.
Selected hardware model ID (e.g., for filtering to 'ProRack Server X200').
Optional article category filter.
Current result page for article search pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title in the search results list
Click on "My Saved Articles" link in KB navigation
Click on logo or Home breadcrumb

pages.name: Knowledge Base Article
pages.description: Detailed view of a single support article with bookmarking controls.
primary_functions: Display full article content, including sections such as Recommended Next Steps
Allow users to save or bookmark the article using a Save or favorites control
Offer folder selection or creation (e.g., 'Server Issues') when saving the article
Provide navigation back to search results or to the Saved Articles page

incoming_params.description: ID of the knowledge base article to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "My Saved Articles" after bookmarking or from side navigation
Click on "Back to Search Results" link

access_methods.description: From search results or saved articles list.

pages.name: Saved Articles / Bookmarks
pages.description: User-focused page listing all saved or bookmarked knowledge base articles.
primary_functions: List all saved knowledge base articles, optionally grouped by folder such as 'Server Issues'
Allow users to open an article from the saved list in the article view
Provide basic bookmark management actions such as removing items or changing their folder (if supported)

incoming_params.description: Optional folder to preselect when viewing saved articles.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved article title
Click on "Search Knowledge Base" link

access_methods.description: Linked from Knowledge Base and knowledge article pages.
Direct access via saved_articles.html with optional folderId parameter.

pages.name: Training & Events Listing
pages.description: Catalog of upcoming training sessions and webinars, including cloud migration training.
primary_functions: List upcoming training sessions and webinars with dates and brief descriptions
Allow searching events by keyword such as 'cloud migration'
Filter or limit visible events to future dates only
Provide links to detailed event pages where users can register

incoming_params.description: Optional keyword filter, e.g., 'cloud migration'.
Whether to restrict the list to future-dated events.
Events result page for pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event card or title
Click on site logo or Home breadcrumb

pages.name: Event Detail & Registration
pages.description: Detail page for a specific training or webinar event with registration form.
primary_functions: Show detailed information about an event, including title, description, schedule, and time zone information
Offer a registration form capturing attendee name, email, number of seats, and time zone
Allow attendees to set their experience level (e.g., Intermediate) before registering
Submit event registrations and confirm that the registration has been recorded

incoming_params.description: ID of the training or webinar event to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Back to Events" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via event_detail.html?eventId=<id> from the events listing.
Shared registration links in emails or campaigns.

pages.name: Custom Server Configurator
pages.description: Interactive configurator for building custom servers and attaching maintenance plans.
primary_functions: Allow users to select a base server model such as a rack server chassis
Provide options to configure memory, storage, and other components while showing a live price summary
Enable adjustment of optional components so the total price falls within a target range (e.g., $3,000–$4,000)
Offer support and maintenance plan options such as a 3-year maintenance plan and add the configured server to the quote cart

incoming_params.description: Optional base server model to preselect, typically from a server product listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "View Quote Cart" after adding configuration
Click on "Browse All Server Products" link

access_methods.description: Links from server product listings and homepage CTAs.
Direct access via server_configurator.html with optional baseModelId parameter.

pages.name: Quote Cart
pages.description: Cart-like page for managing saved server configurations and submitting quote requests.
primary_functions: Display all server configurations added for quoting with key specs and pricing
Allow users to review configurations and remove any they no longer want to quote
Provide a clear action to proceed with a formal quote request for the items in the quote cart
Collect or confirm basic contact information as part of proceeding with the quote (if required)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Add Another Configuration" link
Click on "Return to Home" after successfully submitting a quote request

pages.name: Company Info & Contact
pages.description: Informational page about the company with a general contact form.
primary_functions: Present information about the company, its software development and hardware service capabilities, and locations
Provide general contact details such as phone, email, and address
Offer a simple contact form for general inquiries not covered by specific quote or booking forms

incoming_params.description: Optional topic or context for the inquiry, such as 'software', 'hardware', or 'managed_it'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on site logo or explicit "Back to Home" link

pages.name: Terms of Service
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the website and services.
primary_functions: Display the terms and conditions for using the website, products, and services
Provide reference information for customers regarding their rights and obligations

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Privacy Policy" link from within the Terms page

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information about how user data is collected, used, and protected.
primary_functions: Explain what personal and usage data the company collects and how it is used
Describe data protection practices and user choices regarding privacy

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Terms of Service" link from within the Privacy Policy page

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to products, services, support, and training
Browse all products with filters and search
View and filter business laptops and other laptop models
Browse hardware accessories such as keyboards, mice, and cables
Browse server products and access the custom server configurator
Learn about software development services and request CRM integration quotes
View hardware service offerings and schedule on-site maintenance visits
Compare managed IT support plans and start sign-up
Search support articles and troubleshoot issues
Find and register for training sessions and webinars
Configure custom servers and add them to a quote cart
View and manage items in the shopping cart
Review configured servers and proceed with quote requests

footer_links.description: Learn about the company and reach out via the contact form
Access help articles and troubleshooting guides
Browse upcoming training sessions and webinars
Explore managed IT support plans and features
View and book hardware and on-site support services
Read the terms and conditions for using the site and services
Understand how your data is collected and protected
